message:
style(mux): rustfmt import reordering across 13 mux modules and update beads tracker

Automated formatting pass applying Rust 2024 edition / updated rustfmt
import ordering rules across mux crate modules.  Types sorted before
functions within use groups, shorter paths before longer paths, and
alphabetical within each group.

Minor assert!() macro reformatting in tab.rs and tmux_commands.rs to
match updated rustfmt style.

Files: client.rs, connui.rs, domain.rs, events.rs, localpane.rs,
pane.rs, ssh.rs, ssh_agent.rs, tab.rs, termwiztermtab.rs, tmux.rs,
tmux_commands.rs, tmux_pty.rs

No logic changes — pure formatting/style.

Also updates beads tracker timestamps for wa-1igc (safe-restart
workflow) and wa-7o4f (mux notification coalescing).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
